title: eleocharis uniglumis subsp. fennica
intro: Eleocharis uniglumis subsp. fennica, also known as Finnish spike-rush, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis uniglumis subsp. fennica include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
